title: Four teenagers arrested for axe attack on constable in Mossel Bay
description: NATIONAL NEWS - An off-duty police officer...
bodyText:
Breaking News

NATIONAL NEWS - An off-duty police officer (30) was attacked with an axe in Mossel Bay at about 01:45 yesterday, Sunday 25 May, when he and his partner were walking in Dalindyebo Street, D'Almeida.


> Four suspects, aged 16 to 19, have been arrested and are set to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, according to police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies.


He says a preliminary investigation suggests that the suspects, allegedly armed with an axe and other sharp weapons, assaulted the officer.


> Read more on the Mossel Bay Advertiser


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
